name: The effects of the phosphodiesterase type 5 inhibitor vardenafil on cognitive performance in healthy adults: a behavioral-electroencephalography study.
summary: Human study of the PDE5 inhibitor vardenafil, not tadalafil, assessing memory, executive function, EEG, reaction time, and complaints in healthy young adults.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract available; full text not checked.
access_attempts.notes: Used as adjacent non-tadalafil class evidence only.
